rekognition.streamprocessor.kinesisvideo: The Kinesis video stream that provides the source of the streaming video for an Amazon Rekognition Video stream processor. For more information, see [KinesisVideoStream](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/rekognition/latest/APIReference/API_KinesisVideoStream).

rekognition.streamprocessor.kinesisvideo.Description: ARN of the Kinesis video stream stream that streams the source video.
